name: career-vs-linkedin
title: Career Page vs LinkedIn — First-Posting Proof
description: Uses the Wayback Machine to compare when jobs first appeared on a company's career page versus LinkedIn, providing historical evidence that career pages are the primary source of job postings — often days or weeks before LinkedIn indexes them.

companyName.title: Company name
companyName.description: Human-readable company name (e.g. 'Stripe'). Auto-detected from careerPageUrl if omitted.

careerPageUrl.title: Career page URL
careerPageUrl.description: The company's career portal URL. Examples: https://boards.greenhouse.io/stripe, https://jobs.lever.co/openai, https://jobs.ashbyhq.com/linear

linkedinSlug.title: LinkedIn company slug
linkedinSlug.description: The company slug from their LinkedIn URL (e.g. 'stripe' from linkedin.com/company/stripe). Used to find LinkedIn job page archives.

linkedinCompanyId.title: LinkedIn company ID (numeric)
linkedinCompanyId.description: Numeric LinkedIn company ID for jobs/search?f_C= URLs. Optional — use linkedinSlug instead if possible.

batchMode.title: Batch mode
batchMode.description: Run on multiple companies at once. Uses built-in seed list (Stripe, Coinbase, Anthropic, OpenAI…) unless you supply a custom companies list.

companies.title: Companies list (batch mode)
companies.description: Override the seed list. Each item: { name, careerPageUrl, linkedinSlug?, linkedinCompanyId? }

startDate.title: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD)
startDate.description: Earliest Wayback snapshot date to analyze. Defaults to 1 year ago.

endDate.title: End date (YYYY-MM-DD)
endDate.description: Latest Wayback snapshot date to analyze. Defaults to today.

maxSnapshots.title: Max snapshots per source
maxSnapshots.description: Maximum number of CDX snapshots to fetch per platform (career page and LinkedIn separately). Higher = more evidence but slower.

delayMs.title: Delay between requests (ms)
delayMs.description: Milliseconds to wait between Wayback Machine requests to avoid rate limits.

googleAiApiKey.title: Google AI API key (Gemini)
googleAiApiKey.description: Gemini key for research narrative generation. Leave blank to use the GOOGLE_AI_API_KEY secret, or omit for stats-only output.
